```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement embedding strategy for semantic search"
---
# Embedding Strategy
## Task
Implement embedding generation and management for semantic search.
## Requirements
1. Select embedding model (OpenAI, Sentence-Transformers, local). 2. Implement batch embedding generation.
3. Store embeddings in vector database. 4. Implement similarity search (cosine, dot product).
5. Handle embedding model versioning and migration.
## Constraints
- Choose embedding dimension wisely (size vs quality). Batch for efficiency. Index for speed.
## Success Criteria
- Embeddings generated efficiently. Similarity search fast and relevant. Version managed.
```
